sourceName: National Judicial Data Grid - Supreme Court of India dashboard
reportingPeriod: As captured from NJDG Supreme Court dashboard on 2026-06-18
notes: Supreme Court of India total pendency captured from the National Judicial Data Grid Supreme Court dashboard.
Civil/criminal split, institution YTD, disposal YTD, old-case count, and bench-size split were not available in the captured source and are not represented as real split values.
Zero values in unavailable split fields are schema placeholders, not official zero counts.
